description: A security analyst must review a recorded session of a contractor who used a privileged account to access a critical server.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the video recording and command log of the contractor's privileged session from the PAM tool.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully retrieves the session evidence.

nodes.task_description: Review the recording to ensure the contractor only performed the actions they were authorized to do in the change ticket.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst compares the performed actions against the authorized actions.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the contractor attempted to run a command that was outside the scope of the approved work and flag the session for a security review.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst correctly identifies a policy violation and escalates it.
